title.en: MACHINES, TOOLS, EQUIPMENT OR METHODS FOR MANUFACTURING OR REPAIRING FOOTWEAR
Foot or last measuring devices; Measuring devices for shoe parts
Foot-measuring devices (measuring the shape, pattern or size of the body for diagnostic purposes A61B5/103, e.g. measuring physical dimensions A61B5/107)
Last-measuring devices
Measuring devices for the inside measure of shoes, for the height of heels, or for the arrangement of heels
Measuring devices for shoe parts
Lasts
Lasts for making or repairing shoes (making of wooden lasts B27M3/20)
Pneumatic lasts; Elastic lasts
Wedge locks for lasts
Devices for stretching special parts of shoes
Devices for removing lasts
Devices for inserting or reinserting lasts
Stretching or spreading lasts; Boot-trees; Fillers; Devices for maintaining the shape of the shoe (drying of footwear A47L23/20)
Hand appliances or hand tools for making or repairing shoes, other than those covered by groups A43D15/00, A43D19/00, A43D95/00, A43D100/00, A43D117/00
{for heel removing}
Stands for making footwear (stands for cleaning shoes A47L23/16)
Knives (knives in general B26B)
Tools for cutting off the ends of nails or pegs in shoes
Awls (making B21G)
Shoe-peg rasps (wood rasps B27G17/06)
Hand nailing apparatus for shoemaking (A43D19/02 takes precedence; nailing apparatus in general B25C, B27F)
Machines for cutting, ornamenting, marking or otherwise working up shoe part blanks (pulling-over or lasting A43D9/00 - A43D23/00; making or fastening soles, heels or welts A43D25/00 - A43D83/00)
{specially adapted for forming upper blanks or leggings by stretching}
{for forming shoe stiffeners}
Cutting-out (cutting in general B26D, B26F; of leather articles in general C14B5/00)
Ornamentation (by creasing A43D8/44; of leather in general C14B1/56)
Marking for future work (A43D8/16 takes precedence; printing per se, stamping per se B41)
Working on edges or margins (of leather in general C14B1/02, C14B11/00)
Creasing presses (folding on margins A43D8/40)
Splitting (of leather in general C14B1/02)
Flexing (of leather in general C14B)
Devices for binding the uppers upon the lasts (for the toe ends A43D15/00)
Machines for preliminary treatment or assembling of upper-parts, counters, or insoles on their lasts preparatory to the pulling-over or lasting operations; Applying or removing protective coverings
{Applying or removing protective coverings}
{Devices for temporarily fixing or aligning insoles on lasts}
Machines for applying reinforcement or ornamental straps to the margins of uppers (to soles or insoles A43D43/06)
Machines for seam-pressing or flattening shoe parts, quarters, or the like (on lasted shoes A43D55/00)
Machines for temporary buttoning of shoe parts
Machines for temporary lacing of shoe parts or for cutting-away the lacing strips after lasting
Devices for holding the lacing portions in position during lasting
Machines for forming the toe part or heel part of shoes, with or without use of heat
Devices for treating shoe parts, e.g. stiffeners, with steam or liquid (for soled shoes A43D95/12)
Machines for pulling-over the uppers when loosely laid upon the last and tacking the toe end
Devices for locating caps or stiffeners on pulling-over machines

Pulling-over or lasting machines for binding the toe end with cord, string, or wire; Machines for lasting with clamps; Lasting machines with sewing devices, also for platform shoes (special sewing machines for leather or shoes D05B)
Pulling-over or lasting machines with oscillating shoe supports
Hand lasting; Lasting pincers
Tacking or nailing devices for use with lasting pincers
Lasting machines
{with lasting strings, stretching straps or the like, for forming the shank portions of shoes}
{with rotating lasting means}
with one single lasting gripper
for lasting the opposite sides of the shoe one after another
for wooden soles (A43D21/16, A43D21/18 take precedence)
with last supports and toe- or heel-embracing wipers movable both horizontally and vertically (A43D21/16 takes precedence)
Bed-lasting machines
with lasting clamps, shoe-shaped clamps, {pincers,} wipers, stretching straps or the like for forming the toe or heel parts of the last {(A43D21/16, A43D21/18 take precedence)}
for toe or heel parts, with nailing devices
with lasting pincers {and} toe- or heel-embracing wipers
with lasting pincers and straight-acting wipers, also for forming the shank portions of shoes
Single parts for pulling-over or lasting machines (nailing devices A43D75/00)
Wipers; Sole-pressers; Last-supports; Pincers
Last-carriers; Shoe-guides
Devices for cutting-off superfluous material on the uppers or linings
Devices for gluing shoe parts
Devices for lasting with adhesives or for gluing together insoles and uppers (A43D25/18, A43D25/20 take precedence)
Devices for gluing soles on shoe bottoms (A43D25/18, A43D25/20 take precedence)
Devices for gluing heel-breasts to heels or for gluing coverings on heels (A43D25/18, A43D25/20 take precedence)
Devices for filling the shoe bottom
Devices for making glued platform shoes
Devices for applying adhesives to shoe parts (A43D25/20 takes precedence; applying liquids or other fluent materials to surfaces in general B05)
Arrangements for activating or for accelerating setting of adhesives, e.g. by using heat
Machines for trimming as an intermediate operation (working on edges or margins, e.g. by trimming, of shoe part blanks A43D8/32; trimming as a finishing operation in shoemaking A43D87/00)
Soles or heels fixed on shoe bottoms (stamps or dies for soles or heel-lifts C14B)
Machines for making soles from strips of material
Machines for making or inserting shank stiffeners
Machines for making shank stiffeners
Machines for inserting shank stiffeners
Machines for assembling lifts for heels (cutting-out heel lifts A43D8/02)
Gauges for heel lifts; Magazines for piling up heel lifts
Nailing machines for building the heels from lifts
Machines for sorting heel lifts
Presses for shaping pre-existing loose soles, shoe bottoms or soles fixed to shoe bottoms (glueing soles on shoe bottoms A43D25/06)
Machines for roughening soles or other shoe parts preparatory to gluing
{characterised by constructional details of the rotative tools used therewith}
Machines for making foot-supporting pads or instep-raisers for flat feet
Machines for making stitch lips, or other preparatory treatment of soles or insoles before fixing same (flexing of soles or insoles A43D8/52)
for making stitch lips by cutting
for applying reinforcing materials to insoles; Attachment of ornamental tapes or ribs, e.g. sewing ribs, on soles, or the like
Machines for attaching welts or rands
Machines for trimming or butting welts fixed on uppers
Machines for pounding
Machines for lip-setting
Machines for trimming-off surplus material along the inseam
Machines for flattening, pressing, or rubbing the inseams of lasted shoes
Machines for attaching the welt ends
Machines for rasping the lasting-margins of shoes which are sewn through
Machines for nail-pulling, nail-cutting, or nail-detecting
Machines for carrying-out other finishing operations
Machines for fastening soles or heels by means of screws or screwed wire
Shoe-nailing machines (nailing machines in general B27F)
{using nails being made from alternative materials, e.g. leather}
using ready-made nails
with apparatus for separating the nails from a wire or from a strip of metal or other material
using ready-made staples
with apparatus for making staples
using ready-made wooden pegs
with apparatus for separating the pegs from a strip of wood
for nailing or stapling the lasted margin onto shoes with wooden soles
Elements of nailing machines; Nail-feeding devices
Driving mechanisms for moving the horn; Nail-cutting apparatus connected with the horn
Nailing devices on pulling-over or lasting machines
Combined heel-pressing and nailing machines
Machines for attaching top-lifts
Heel-presses without nailing apparatus; Machines for pressing single lifts or punching holes for nailing
Machines or apparatus for turning, e.g. for making turn-shoes
Machines for assembling soles or heels onto uppers, not provided for in groups A43D25/00 - A43D83/00, e.g. by welding
Edge or heel cutters; Machines for trimming the heel breast (trimming machines for wooden heels B27M; copying machines B44B)
Sole-levelling machines with rolls
Stitch-separating or seam-indenting machines
Edge-indenting machines
Shoe-finishing machines
Machines for treating or smoothing shoe uppers to remove wrinkles, folds, or the like
Machines for laying channel-flaps
Machines for colouring or chemical treatment; Ornamenting the sole bottoms (burnishing A43D95/20)
Machines or tools for scouring, abrading, or finishing, with or without dust-separating (suction cleaners for removing dust A47L5/00; domestic cleaning of footwear A47L23/00)
Drying or heating devices for shoes
Devices for conditioning, tempering, or moistening (preparatory to pulling-over or lasting A43D11/14)
incorporating marking, printing, or embossing apparatus (ornamentation of shoe part blanks A43D8/16; printing  per se , stamping  per se B41)
Burnishing tools for shoemaking (in general B24D)
Machines for burnishing soles or heels
Machines for burnishing the edges of soles, with or without devices for edge-indenting
Machines for buffing soles
Devices for applying wax
Machines for attaching protectors to soles or heels
Machines for making pulling-on pieces
Machines for making laces (of leather C14B; braidings in general D04C); Applying fibre or celluloid to ends of laces (making tags from metal sheet B21D; from wire B21F)
Setting or removing eyelets, buttons, lacing-hooks, or elastic gussets in shoes
Punching and eyelet-setting machines or tools (for garments in general A41H37/02)
Setting buttons on footwear (for garments A41H37/00)
Machines or tools for setting lacing-hooks in shoes
Machines for inserting elastic gussets in shoes
Devices for removing buttons, lacing-hooks, or the like from shoes
Shoe machines with conveyors for jacked shoes {or for shoes or shoe parts}
{with clamping or gripping mechanism}
{with special means to place the shoe or shoe part in the following machine}
Machines for making shoes with out-turned flanges of the uppers or for making moccasins
Machines for skiving or removing heel-lifts, heels, or soles, or for removing stitches, preparatory to repair
Racks for receiving or transporting shoes or shoe parts; Other conveying means
Driving or controlling mechanisms of shoe machines; Frames for shoe machines
Machines or methods characterised by special features
Fully automated machines, i.e. machines working without human intervention
Machines including a carousel with different working posts around a turning table
Machines including a magazine, e.g. for feeding blanks, pre-forms or sheets
Multitool machines, e.g. machines with a plurality of tools or working heads
Machines using pneumatic means
Computer aided manufacture of footwear, e.g. CAD or CAM
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
